title: Custom Music Discs
description: Swaps default Minecraft jukebox disc audio for other video game music.
body:
# Custom Music Discs
Minecraft resource pack that swaps the default jukebox music in minecraft for other video game music.

None of the music is mine. Some of the discs are mashups of several tracks.

You can report issues with the resource pack or suggest a new track to be added with the upcoming 1.21 disc on my GitHub issues page: [https://github.com/DarkCows/custom-music/issues](https://github.com/DarkCows/custom-music/issues)

## Music Used:
* Naoto Kubo - Bubblaine
* Kazumi Totaka, Charles Cornell, Steven Kirsty, Matt Niedbalski - K. K. Jazz
* TJ Davis, Richard Jacques - Can You Feel The Sunshine?
* Azumi Takahashi, Lotus Juice - Full Moon Full Life
* Shihoko Hirata - Pursuing My True Self
* Shoji Meguro, J-MUSIC Ensemble - Days When My Mother Was There
* bo en, Kota Kawai, Toby Fox - Splintered Sweets In The Castle, Prelude
* Lena Raine - Farewell
* Andrew Prahlow - Timber Hearth
* Keiichi Okabe - Rays of Light
* Oliver Lewin - Stay Here
* Christopher Larkin - Dirthmouth & Kevin Penkin - Pathway
* Martin Stig Andersen - Shockwave
* Russ Morgan, Hakita - Take Care
* Mike Morasky - Hire
* Pedro Silva - Numbers
